project_type: Next.js 16 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS 4 + Turso/libsql electrician business management app
build_system: Next.js (npx next build). No npm install allowed - INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network.
test_framework: No test framework - verification via build only
verification_instructions: Run npx next build in /projects/sandbox/electricista-app and confirm it passes with no errors.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - node_modules already present. DO NOT run npm install.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network. Cannot install new packages. Only use existing deps: next, react, react-dom, lucide-react, @libsql/client, uuid, xmlbuilder2, tailwindcss 4, @tailwindcss/postcss.
contribution_requirements: Commit directly to main branch. No PRs needed.
key_patterns: All pages are client components with 'use client'. API routes use NextRequest/NextResponse. Database via @libsql/client with getDbClient(). TicketBAI generation in src/lib/ticketbai/. Forms inline in pages. Tailwind for styling with yellow-500 as primary color currently. Components in src/components/ (only Sidebar and MobileNav). All text in Spanish.
directory_structure: src/app/ - pages and API routes. src/components/ - reusable components. src/lib/ - database, templates, ticketbai logic.
